parsed.production_notes: The video primarily features human actors recorded in a real-world outdoor setting. However, it includes a brief segment showcasing an AI-generated female avatar, identifiable by its slightly unnatural smoothness and typical AI lip-sync.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back in a simple style.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a plain black short-sleeved t-shirt and loose-fitting black trousers throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Curious, surprised, and eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. He has short dark hair, a light beard, and wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a white long-sleeve button-down shirt tucked into black trousers. He carries a blue laptop bag initially, and later holds a lunchbox.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, with long, wavy dark hair. She has symmetrical, smooth facial features typical of AI generation.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a professional navy blue blazer over a simple white top.

scenes.setting: Outdoor paved courtyard of a modern building complex, daytime, bright natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman and a young man stand facing each other in an outdoor paved courtyard. The woman, Character A, wears a black short-sleeved t-shirt and black trousers. The man, Character B, wears a white long-sleeve shirt, black trousers, and glasses. He is holding a small lunchbox in his hands. Modern, multi-story buildings with glass windows and some greenery are visible in the background. The lighting is bright, natural daylight. The woman has an inquiring expression, while the man looks confident.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens in an outdoor courtyard of a modern building complex. A young woman stops a young man who is walking towards the camera carrying a laptop bag. They engage in a lively conversation, with the camera cutting between medium shots of each character. The woman appears surprised and gestures animatedly. Later in the scene, the man is seen holding a lunchbox instead of his bag. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting a daytime setting.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಹೇ ಮನೋಜ್, ಇರು ಇರು. ನಿಂಗೆ ಜಾಬ್ ಸಿಕ್ಕಿದೆ ಅಂತೆ, ಅದು 30,000 ಸಂಬಳ. [Hey Manoj, wait wait. I heard you got a job, that too with a 30,000 salary.]
Character A says: ನಿಂಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಬರಲ್ಲ, ಆದ್ರೂ ಹೇಗೆ? [You don't know how to speak English, then how?]
Character B says: Who told you that? I learned speaking English in just 15 days.
Character B says: ಅಂಡ್ ಜಾಬ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಕ್ಕಿದೆ. [And I got a job too.]
Character A says: ನೀನು ಇಷ್ಟು ಬೇಗ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [How did you learn to speak English so fast?]
Character B says: ಸೀಕ್ರೆಟ್ ಇದೆ, ಆದ್ರೆ ಹೇಳ್ತೀನಿ. [There is a secret, but I will tell you.]

scenes.setting: Outdoor courtyard and a plain white background for the avatar.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman, Character C, with long, wavy dark hair stands against a plain white background. She is wearing a professional navy blue blazer over a simple white top. She is looking directly forward with a friendly, approachable expression. The lighting is even and bright, highlighting her features clearly. The framing is a medium shot, showing her from the chest up.

scenes.visual_description: The conversation continues in the same outdoor courtyard. The man, holding his lunchbox, explains something to the woman. The video then cuts to a full-screen graphic of a smartphone. On the phone screen, a female AI avatar in professional attire is shown against a white background. The camera then cuts back to the man in the courtyard as he finishes his explanation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: SpeakX app. [SpeakX app.]
Character A says: ಏನು? SpeakX app? ಇದರಿಂದ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [What? SpeakX app? How did you learn from this?]
Character B says: ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ತುಂಬಾ ಈಸಿಯಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ. [In this app, there is an AI teacher. They teach English very easily.]
Character B says: ಚಿಕ್ಕ ಮಕ್ಕಳು ಕೂಡ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 10 ರಿಂದ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, ಅವ್ರು ಕೂಡ 15 ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾರೆ. [Even small children, if they practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily, they will also learn English in 15 days.]
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ, ನಿಜಾನಾ? [Is it, really?]

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man and a young woman stand outdoors in a paved courtyard, engaged in conversation. The man, Character B, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt and glasses, holds a lunchbox and speaks with a confident, expressive demeanor. The woman, Character A, dressed in a black t-shirt and black trousers, listens attentively. The background consists of modern, multi-story buildings and some trees. The scene is lit by natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The man and woman are still standing in the courtyard. The man speaks confidently while holding his lunchbox. The video cuts to a screencast of a smartphone app, displaying a grid of various conversational scenarios with thumbnail images. The camera returns to the man, who emphasizes his point with hand gestures. The woman listens attentively to his success story.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ನೀವು ಟೈಮ್ ವೇಸ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾಗ ನಾನು ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. [When you were wasting time, I was practicing on this app.]
Character B says: ಹೇಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ? ಮ್ಯಾನೇಜರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು... ಕಸ್ಟಮರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಡೀಲ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾಡಬೇಕು... ಆಫೀಸ್ ಫ್ರೆಂಡ್ಸ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು... [You know how? How to speak English with the manager... how to deal with customers... how to speak English with office friends...]
Character B says: ಬರಿ 15 ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಷ್ಟು ಫ್ಲುಯೆಂಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಂತ ನಾನು ಅನ್ಕೊಂಡಿರಲಿಲ್ಲ. [I didn't think my English would become this fluent in just 15 days.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman in a black t-shirt and a young man in a white shirt stand facing each other in an outdoor courtyard. The woman, Character A, has a slightly concerned or questioning expression on her face. The man, Character B, who is holding a blue laptop bag in one hand and a smartphone in the other, looks at her reassuringly. The background features modern buildings with glass entrances and paved walkways. The lighting is natural and bright.

scenes.visual_description: In the final scene, the woman looks concerned and asks the man a question. The man, now holding his laptop bag again, responds reassuringly and gestures towards his phone. They are still in the same outdoor location. The video concludes with a full-screen end-card displaying a smartphone interface. The screen shows the app's premium features and a countdown timer for a trial offer.
scenes.audio_transcript:

Character A says: ನಾನು ನಿನ್ನ ತರ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಇಂದ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಕಲಿಬಹುದಾ? [Can I also learn to speak English from this app like you?]
Character B says: ಇವತ್ತೇ SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡು, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಕಲಿ, ನಿಂಗೂ ಕೂಡ 100% ಜಾಬ್ ಗ್ಯಾರಂಟಿ. [Download the SpeakX app today, learn to speak English, and you too have a 100% job guarantee.]
